zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Wilbraham於大約1456年出生在英國英格蘭爾時，她的父親Thomas Wilbraham, III Lord of Woodhey49歲，母親Margaret Swettenham28歲。她於1504年與Thomas Hill在英國英格蘭史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1545年在她的家鄉享年90歲。

nameMeanings.name: Wilbraham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Great and Little Wilbraham (Cambridgeshire). The placename derives from the Old English female personal name Wilburg + Old English hām ‘village, homestead’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Wilbraham was born about 1456, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Wilbraham, III Lord of Woodhey, was 49 and her mother, Margaret Swettenham, was 28. She married Thomas Hill in 1504, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1545, in her hometown, at the age of 90.

Elle a épousé Thomas Hill en 1504, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1545, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 90 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Wilbraham(이)가 대략 1456년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Wilbraham, III Lord of Woodhey(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Swettenham(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1504년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 Thomas Hill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1545년 그녀의 고향에서 90세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Wilbraham родилась около 1456 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Wilbraham, III Lord of Woodhey было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Swettenham, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Hill в 1504 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1545 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 90 лет.
